name: Butter Pecan Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Blend on low speed until all ingredients are just combined.
3. Beat on medium speed for four minutes.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean and the cake begins to pull away from the sides of the pan.
6. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes.
7. Remove and glaze with a thin confectioners sugar icing if desired.
